title: Multiple Windows on App
excerpt:
Ability to open multiple windows on the monday.com app (amongst my team, we use Windows and Mac) to view different boards/views at once. 
I’d like to be able to view our master campaign calendar while checking the to-do’…

posts.author: MMatharu (Megan Matharu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ability to open multiple windows on the monday.com app (amongst my team, we use Windows and Mac) to view different boards/views at once.

I’d like to be able to view our master campaign calendar while checking the to-do’s in another board. Additionally, viewing a dashboard in a separate window would allow this to be shared onto a screen to motivate the team in the office.

posts.author: hbeckett (Haley Beckett)
posts.cookedHtml:
I second this! There are multiple people in our office that have expressed how much they would like this.
We are used to the ability of having multiple spreadsheet files open on our computers, and since switching to using Monday for these tasks it has become harder to manage. This is especially evident when you’re in the middle of a task on Monday but need to glance at a different board/item, but aren’t ready to back out of what you’re working on.

posts.author: Daminaio (dectatang)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be incredibly helpful to have the ability to open multiple windows in the monday.com app, especially since our team uses both Windows and Mac. Being able to view different boards and views at once would improve workflow efficiency. For example, I’d like to keep our master campaign calendar open while checking to-do’s on another board. Additionally, having a separate window for a 1win dashboard would allow me to display it on a screen in the office to keep the team motivated and focused.
